title: Soccer Star Scores Hat-Trick of Awards
story: Dribbling past defenders wasn't Johan Cruyff's only talent. The Dutch soccer wizard kicked his way into history on December 31, 1974. Cruyff, playing for Ajax, won the Ballon d'Or for the third time. This golden ball trophy goes to Europe's best footballer. Rockström is famous for creating guidelines called Planetary Boundaries, which help us understand how to keep our planet healthy.
activity_question: What did Johan Rockström create to help understand Earth's limits?
follow_up_question: Why do you think it's important to understand Earth's limits?

title: Racing Champion Born on New Year's Eve
story: Vroom! A future racing star zoomed into the world on December 31, 1974. Tony Kanaan was born in Salvador, Brazil, destined for speed. He grew up to become a champion auto racer, winning the prestigious Indianapolis 500 in 2013. Kanaan's talent and determination also earned him the IndyCar Series title in 2004.
